title: sdgFrequency
description:
Controls the display frequency of the data returned.
  * **D** = Daily data (to receive most recent day's values, you must use daily frequency). 
  * **W** = Weekly, End of week as of UTC Sunday at 12 AM. 
  * **M** = Monthly, End of month as of UTC 12 AM.
  * **CY** = Yearly, End of year as of UTC 12 AM.
